title: Random Craft
description: An Adventure themed modpack including 100 mods. New Gear, new Gameplay and new Goals.
body:
**Random Craft** is a lightweight, Adventure themed modpack including roughly 100 mods.
It adds _new Gear, new Goals and new Gameplay._
This modpack features an RPG style adventure and has a certain 'Keeping it Vanilla' aspect to it, while still retaining maximum performace for even the most potato of PCs.
This modpack was mainly created for a server for me and friends to play on.
A few of the mods included in this pack are:
- **Biomes 'o Plenty** for all of that new exciting world generation.
- **Many more Ores and Crafts** to add many new tool and gear sets to the game.
- **E4MC** to allow you to play with your friends no matter the location.
- **Sodium + Other performance mods** to make your game run smoothly while playing.
- **Many QOL Mods** to make sure you feel at home.
